name: McKinley Acquisition Corp
business: McKinley Acquisition Corp is a newly formed blank check company incorporated as an exempted company in the Cayman Islands on March 27, 2025. Its purpose is to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or other similar business combination with one or more operating businesses. The company has not identified any specific business combination target and has not engaged in any substantive discussions with any potential target.

exposures.sentence: These include, but are not limited to, financial technology (fintech), mobility (transporttech), agricultural technology (agtech), clean technology (cleantech), space technology (spacetech), and advanced artificial intelligence.

tamClaims.claim: Target businesses should have a total addressable market greater than $1 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Seeking a company with an enterprise value of $500 million to $2 billion, with a total addressable market greater than $1 billion and annual sales of $75-350 million.
